text: What is the main difference between a market order and a limit order?
answers: Limit orders can only be used for long positions
Executes immediately at the best available price, while a limit order waits for a specific price
Executes only when price hits support
Market orders are only available on futures contracts

answers: Custodial holds private keys for you, non-custodial means you control them

answers: Spot uses leverage, others do not
